tools.name: search-cottages
tools.description:
Search for holiday cottages in the UK.

IMPORTANT - RE-CALL THIS TOOL when the user:
- Asks for different/closer/farther locations → use a more specific destination (e.g., "Liverpool" instead of "North West England")
- Wants to change dates, guests, price range, or amenities
- Asks for "more options", "cheaper", "better rated" → adjust sort or filters
- Asks for "top N" results → use the limit parameter

The destination parameter accepts both broad regions (Cornwall, Lake District) and specific towns/cities (Liverpool, Bath, York). For "closer to X" requests, use the specific city/town name as destination. Leave destination empty to search all of the UK.

Only works for UK destinations and for more than 2 nights.
